name: pnp-copilot-pro-dev-da-repairs-oauth-validated-csharp
title: Declarative Agent with OAuth-secured API Plugin (C#)
shortDescription: This sample demonstrates how to build a declarative agent for Microsoft 365 Copilot that answers questions about repairs. The agent uses an API plugin to connect to an API secured with OAuth. The project contains a C# Azure Function that validates Entra ID tokens.
longDescription: This sample demonstrates how to build a declarative agent for Microsoft 365 Copilot that answers questions about repairs. The agent uses an API plugin to connect to an API secured with OAuth. The project contains a C# Azure Function (.NET 10 isolated worker) that serves as the API and uses Microsoft.IdentityModel to validate Entra ID tokens to secure access to APIs.

thumbnails.alt: Declarative agent answering questions about repairs using the information from an API secured with Entra ID
